objective: Produce an explicit ten-qubit stabilizer generator set encoding one logical qubit with distance at least four.

fields.generators: Exactly nine distinct length-10 strings over I, X, Y, Z.

verification.generator_validity: Every generator is a non-identity ten-qubit Pauli string.
verification.commutation: Every generator pair has zero binary symplectic product.
verification.encoded_dimension: The generator matrix has GF(2) rank nine, so k = 10 - 9 = 1.
verification.distance_threshold: Every Pauli of weight one, two, or three either anticommutes with a generator or belongs to the stabilizer row span.

bounded_negative_contract.claim_limit: A negative artifact describes only the exact enumerated search space unless completeness over all stabilizer codes is proved.
